I come from a family where I wasn’t able to afford therapy. When my friend first recommended BetterHelp I thought back about the pricing I read in online comments. Those comments couldn’t have been further from northern truth! The company has always maintained a strong relationship with their…

BetterHelp has been the outlet in my life that I needed to regain my sense of self. I think sometimes the overwhelming fear people possess in regards to vulnerability, along with stigma worldwide, causes the reluctance to a tool that can be so useful and life-altering in the most purifying way.…

In the UK, NHS mental health services are extremely lacking, for example, NHS secondary care (support workers) are only allowed to work with people for 1 year, then you're on your own (if you can even get care). DBT was cancelled in my area in 2020 because of coronavirus and then stayed closed…

They bill in advance on a recurring subscription plan. Consider this: You are in need of help You take the step to reach out via their web site You take time to complete their lengthy questionnaire You are informed what the subscription fee will be and that you'll be matched to a therapist next You…

At first, I found my therapist friendly; more open than my NHS one, but nice enough. Exploitative and useless.   I signed up with Better Help due to the convincing marketing and I was abroad, it seemed like a good option. The claim of being matched with a therapist for my specific issue was something I really believed and expected. I filled out a very lengthy questionnaire that…

When it comes to online and/or mobile counseling/therapy; in my personal opinion, BetterHelp is the way to go! Especially when being compared to other similar services such as Talkspace or Sanvello. I’m not 100% sure that any of the other similar platforms offer a similar service, however;…

I have recommended betterhelp.com to friends and will continue to do so.   The platform clearly offers more FLEXIBILITY including the options of written messages, video, and/or phone. For friends with social anxiety, this has been a huge benefit / of compelling value. For people with AD/HD, the…

contrastReviews.text: I was suffering with really bad anxiety and depression. I had transferred schools to do my masters and was an athlete. And I was living in campus apartments but was not given a roommate and had no friends since I just moved there.  I struggled everyday to make it through and cried endlessly. I was…

I wanted to love the outcome of my experience, but BetterHelp is not designed for everyone, certainly not me.  I don’t want to say my experience is unique, but I’m dealing with aging parents and complex set of problems with getting my family into care.  I’ve tried this service a few times, and for…
